name: Car Parking School
author: Poki
description: Car Parking School offers a realistic driving and parking experience! Follow the traffic rules, obey the traffic lights and avoid police tickets as you navigate challenging levels. Master the art of parking by maneuvering in tight spaces, completing tasks and avoiding obstacles. Each level tests your skills with realistic mechanics, including fluid controls and immersive environments. How do I play Car Parking School? Forward: W or the up arrow key Brake / Reverse: S or the down arrow key Turn: Use the A and D or left and right arrow keys to turn Camera Adjustment: E Pause: Escape Who created Car Parking School? Car Parking School is created by Peynir Games. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Car Parking School for free? You can play Car Parking School for free on Poki. Can I play Car Parking School on mobile devices and desktop? Car Parking School can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
